description: Request body to dispatch a batch test-generation run (POST /v1/coverage/generate-batch, coverage_routes.py). Crosses the API boundary; constitutionally required to carry a governing schema (ADR-056 D7). 'priority' controls the selection strategy for which files to generate tests for.

priority.description: File selection strategy: 'all' generates for all files without tests; 'missing' targets only files with no test file; 'failing' targets files whose tests are currently failing.

write.description: When false (default), return proposed content only. When true, write to disk.
